reviews.review_text: really enjoying this game only problem is am running out of upgrading i really hope this gets bigger really fun game
Excellent survivor-like, had a lot of fun with it! Works great on the Steam Deck.

I have been playing this game since its first version released. It was already a pretty decent and addicting Survivors-like. Coming back to this and playing the updated version feels like heaven, I am very happy for what these developers achieved with this game; and don't let the silly name fool you: its one of the best in its genre right now.
decent zombie themed survivors game with some unique features that make it a standout, such as character teaming and vast amounts of passive upgrades. recommended on sale.
Fun little bullet heaven, depth is so-so but good graphics and tight gameplay
The game is exactly what it advertised itself to be, and I've really enjoyed the updates. The team combination keeps the gameplay fairly smooth.
Great game to play for about 30-60 minutes listening to new tunes. The newest Elder is particularly good! No offense to sounds design of the game ;) Looking forward to version 1.0

At first I was only searching for any other Bullet haven alternative to Deep Rock Galactic Survivor with Zombie Genre. Upon playing this one, it really got my attention this week leaving and ignoring the latter. Love the game. The only thing that bothers me in these type of games is that it doesn't have any story. I think this is the missing piece to it all that will make these type of games standout to more gamers
I didn't like it at all when I first played it. Clumsy controls, enemies too heavy for first run. But the studio and game "saga" are great so I really recommend this game. It's gonna be great
Fun game, very easy to pick up. As you progress, you can mix abilities with other characters.
This type of gameplay gets old very quickly, but let's just say that in its genre, this game is pretty good.
really fun with objectives that unlock more stuff. game is fun
Very fun game not alot of types of zombie games can make it fun as this, i wish there was more classes and a high skill level ceiling for sweaty players like myself, devs make pt 2.
Good variety of characters, skills, and game modes, and fun action.
Such a fun game, use it to kill time waiting for friends to log on to play other games highly recommend
Very fun and simple game to kill time and progress in.

Its everything your looking for in a simple shooter game. Only... it brings chaos in 0 to 100 instantly. One second your finishing up a level, thinking how much harder is the next difficulty?
So worth the trouble, it makes me shut off my computer when I can't unlock the next phase. Has my heart racing when I'm literally swiping through WASD. Each character class is very unique and they all have special abilities to rank up and gain experience when your fighting the zombie hordes. The stages can seem repetitive, yet I have yet to find a glitch on this product. Altogether, its loaded with nightmares for the faint of heart and there are so many colors moving seamlessly across the screen. Resolution is amazing in my book. 
Now the negatives, the item pick-up interface is a tricky system. You might be standing right over your next boost crate when you get smashed by a boss type. Almost like it overlaps, and maybe this is what the developers wanted. Its not a glitch, sometimes makes it impossible to do two things at once other than running around kiting the mobs. Second, you never really know how close you are to projectiles firing at you. Dodging the entire blobs is enjoying, yet not when your completely out of the way. I'm certain its my video card and not the game slowing down from memory crashes. 
Overall, the aspects of the game are above fair. Its not insanely hard to complete levels, plus the multi-character survival team is massively powered to zone you for quite a while. Happy gaming!
Good rogue like bullet hell. Easy to loose time cos you are just going for another run. So many different build options that you will always second guess yourself.

Even though it's still in early access, there is still quite a bit here and the upgrades are really fun to see. Plus with multiple modes the replayability is there. I am very curious to see what the final results will be in this game.

THIS GAME IS EPIC!

The classes , the upgrades , the progress..

Got me hooked like nothing.. 

Buy it , try it , have fun!

Yet Another Zombie Survivors is one of the best on this genre, and feels under appreciated. Works really well and there isn't as much grinding as on others. For being in Early Access it feels like a complete game, and although we seem to still be missing some maps and/or characters there is a lot to do already.

My Favourite for this Genre, and it is not even close.

Took me around 100 hours to max out all the characters, and more are being added (eventually).

IMO the game is complete and very well worth the price, I do not know why it has the early access tag, but more Maps, Synergies, and Survivors are always welcome.

Thought it's some shoveware trash cus of the title but it's actually an amazing survivors game.

Combat is nice and bloody, all the weapons and powers are very punchy and satisfying unlike in some survivors where everything feels limp and weightless (Soulstone Survivors).

Squad mechanic is great, you can have up to 3 guys at once and choose from the pool of all of their abilities. Or you can go solo.

Progression is nice, the unlockable stuff is pretty fun.

The game is well worth the asking price.

Fun game for a while, but balancing of the characters and skills is way off. One character is nearly requierd and some characters are just not strong enough to make if to the end of some modes.
Not sure if i can recommend. At the moment not, maybe if there are some updates.

Honestly one of the better Survivor likes out there.

-Each class has entirely unique weapons/abilities, so you don't just end up spamming the same top tier abilities every single run regardless of character.

-Enemy behavior is diverse, some shoot at you, some will charge after a warning, some leave slowing or damaging areas on death. 

-Boss design is dynamic, they aren't just big walking hitboxes that dmg you every time you touch them, you can dodge them in interesting ways, like purposefully walking into one so its attack overshoots and misses.

-Visual clarity is good, every enemy attack/projectile/DOT pool has a distinct red hitzone, making it very clear what will dmg you and for how long it remains damaging, can also adjust friendly ability/weapon transparency if the fireworks become too much.

-No RNG stat rolls on equipment, I personally absolutely hate when games do that.

-Gathering mid-run items actually leads to significant power swings, making tense scenarios where comebacks are actually possible, the game is not a 1-way stomp either way like most survivor-likes end up being.

-Bosses can friendly fire other zombies, which is hilarious.
Worth every penny, works great on steam deck too.
Amazing game! Can't wait to continue to build my team and see what new content comes out! Super fun!
Extreme & mindless fun for a low price. What is not to love?
Excellent survivors-like, can't wait for 1.0
When will it become a co-op? I've been waiting for a long time.
Fun game. Expansion when?
game sucks you in its goooood
The game is absolutely amazing
Very nice, very evil :)
